show config services performance-monitoring cfm two-way-delay-measurement DM_TIMING_SESSION | no-more

# ncpl-cfm-nog config-start [28-Jul-2025 06:38:12 UTC]

services
  performance-monitoring
    cfm
      two-way-delay-measurement DM_TIMING_SESSION
        admin-state enabled
        profile TIMING_APPLIED
        target mep-id 2
      !
    !
  !
!

# ncpl-cfm-nog config-end

ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)#
